MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff/Respondent Patelco Credit Union appeared, represented by Richard Rantz, Vice President.
Defendant/Appellant Abimbola Ajayi appeared.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff/Respondent Patelco Credit Union sworn and testified on their own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Abimbola Ajayi sworn and testified on her own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.

The matter is taken under submission.
All exhibits offered in open court returned.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503)
